span.p:
📥 Inputs
Task: title, dueDate, estimatedMinutes
User: availability grid, energy peaks
History: scheduling_signals table

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1️⃣ Generate Candidates
Every 30-min window in next 7 days

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2️⃣ Filter
Remove busy blocks
Remove quiet hours (11pm–8am)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3️⃣ Score Each Slot
Base score
+ Energy peak bonus
+ Proximity-to-deadline penalty
+ Historical completion rate at hour
+ Break buffer penalty (>90min consecutive)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5️⃣ Write to Calendar
proposedTime → Zustand + Supabase

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
📬 Schedule Notification
15 min before proposed time

span.p:
7️⃣ Future Runs Read Signals
Improve energy window accuracy
